_comment: Repo-specific rules for the website-preflight hook. Structural checks (overflow/snap, orphan .snap-on, cache-bust) live in the hook itself and run always. This file declares ONLY the brand/content rules for ajolotelabs.ai. Copy this file into any other website repo and replace the values; the hook itself stays identical across repos.

forbidden_strings.reason: Brand mark must render as 'ajolotelabs' (no period between 'ajolote' and 'labs').
Geo reference 'mex / atx' should be stripped — Pablo asked for no location markers.
Geo reference 'mex1 / atx2' should be stripped.

forbidden_strings._comment: Low-profile positioning stake — see feedback_no_founder_profile.md. Blocks founder/team/about-Pablo content. Exempts footer LinkedIn/GitHub href (they are contact channels, not profile pages).
forbidden_strings.reason: Founder/team heading detected. Violates no-founder-profile positioning stake (feedback_no_founder_profile.md). Remove the heading and section.
Founder/team/about-Pablo section id or class detected. Violates no-founder-profile positioning stake.
Image with alt text referencing 'Pablo' suggests a founder photo. Violates no-founder-profile positioning stake.
Visible 'Founded by Pablo' copy. Violates no-founder-profile positioning stake.
Founder-centric CTA or copy detected. Violates no-founder-profile positioning stake.

required_strings.reason: At least one Calendly booking link must exist on the page.
Footer should link Pablo's real LinkedIn profile (not the placeholder linkedin.com).

forbidden_in_cta.reason: CTA section should funnel to Calendly only; no email fallback buttons.
